name: Lavender
description: An AI-powered email coaching tool that analyses your cold emails in real-time and suggests improvements. Lavender scores your email, identifies issues (too long, too salesy, weak subject line), and recommends fixes before you hit send.
whyUseIt: Writing good cold emails is a skill that takes years to develop — Lavender accelerates the learning curve. It analyses your email against millions of data points and tells you exactly what to fix: shorten this paragraph, make the subject line more specific, remove the jargon, add personalisation. It's like having a cold email coach sitting next to you for every message.
aiCapabilities: Lavender's AI scores emails on readability, personalisation, and likely reply rate. It suggests rewrites, generates personalised openers based on the prospect's LinkedIn profile, and benchmarks your emails against top performers.
funnelPosition: Top of funnel — outbound email optimisation
sellerWorkflow: Reps write an email in their email client or sequencing tool, Lavender analyses it in real-time (as a sidebar), provides a score and specific recommendations, and the rep edits before sending. Over time, reps internalise the patterns and need less coaching.
managerExpects: Email quality scores trending upward over time. Reps using Lavender's recommendations to improve reply rates, not just hitting send on the first draft.
demoDescription: Compose a cold email, watch Lavender score it in real-time, review the specific recommendations (length, tone, personalisation), apply the fixes, and see the score improve.

vocabulary.definition: Lavender's 0-100 rating of your email's likely effectiveness, based on length, readability, personalisation, and subject line quality.
Lavender's feature that pulls data from the prospect's LinkedIn profile and suggests personalised opening lines.

beginnerMistakes: Blindly accepting all AI suggestions instead of using them as guidance
Obsessing over a perfect score instead of focusing on genuine personalisation and relevance
Not using Lavender consistently — the value comes from building better habits over time
